description_long: This bungalow features a simple rectangular structure with a low-pitched, reddish-brown gable roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a small covered entryway with a tiled awning and a single wooden door, flanked by a window. The side and rear elevations show large, vertically oriented windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The building sits on a flat, green base, suggesting a lawn or yard, and is accompanied by several upright panels or boards nearby, possibly for signage or decoration. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functional living space. The roof overhangs slightly, offering some shade and protection to the entry area.
description: A white, single-story bungalow with a reddish-brown gable roof, large windows, and a small covered entryway. The design is minimalistic and functional, set on a green base with nearby upright panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a small covered porch, a wooden door, a window, and several upright panels in front.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long white wall, a single large window, and the edge of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting two large, vertically oriented windows and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch extension, a small window, and the arrangement of upright panels to the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
